scripts.tidy: npx depcheck && npm prune && npm dedupe
scripts.extract-fonts: npm run extract-cascadia && npm run extract-plex
scripts.extract-cascadia: shx cp node_modules/@fontsource/cascadia-code/files/cascadia-code-latin-{200,300,400,500,600,700}-normal.woff2 public/fonts && shx cp node_modules/@fontsource/cascadia-code/files/cascadia-code-latin-ext-{200,300,400,500,600,700}-normal.woff2 public/fonts
scripts.extract-plex: shx cp node_modules/@fontsource/ibm-plex-sans/files/ibm-plex-sans-latin-{200,300,400,500,600,700}-normal.woff2 public/fonts && shx cp node_modules/@fontsource/ibm-plex-sans/files/ibm-plex-sans-latin-ext-{200,300,400,500,600,700}-normal.woff2 public/fonts
